title: Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd!
